nasb.text: Then Josiah celebrated the Passover to the Lord in Jerusalem, and they slaughtered the Passover animals on the fourteenth day of the first month.

esv.text: Josiah kept a Passover to the Lord in Jerusalem. And they slaughtered the Passover lamb on the fourteenth day of the first month.

cnv.text: 約西亞在耶路撒冷守逾越節記念耶和華；正月十四日他們宰了逾越節的羊羔。

ccb.text: 约西亚在耶路撒冷为耶和华守逾越节。一月十四日，众人宰杀逾越节的祭牲。
